DataRequest.techniqueName: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall
DataRequest.Name: Windows: Netsh Port or Application Allowed / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects nets commands to add a Windows firewall rule to allow Incoming Connections by Port or Application. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/process_creation/win_netsh_fw_add.yml
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Netsh Port or Application Allowed on $hostName

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process" AND command REGEXP ".*netsh.*" AND command REGEXP ".*firewall add.*"
